songs.title: Look Ma No Brains!
feed: “Look Ma No Brains!” by Green Day spends a 6th week at #1 in the Personal Hot 100.

“Look Ma No Brains!” by Green Day is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 245,952 total units.
